target: Add reading-guide paragraph to Overview naming the 12-tab argument arc (ISS-2219)
summary: Added a ds-reading-guide paragraph between the Overview title block and the thesis hero in generate-html.js. The paragraph names all 12 tabs in sequence (Evaluation Guide → The Model → Self-Contradictions → Wins Reviewed → Kill Shots → Timestamp Error → Predictions Analysis → External Tests → AI & Conclusions), explaining that the argument builds across tabs and is clearest read in order. Also added corresponding .ds-reading-guide CSS rule. No changes to sections.json or wins.json — this is a generate-html.js prose addition only.

patches.description:
Add

paragraph between ds-title-block close and ds-thesis-hero section, naming all 12 tabs in sequence order

tldr_evidence: The Overview previously had no statement orienting readers to the tab sequence. The arrow nav and Five-questions preface partially filled the gap but no 'argument arc' summary existed.
tldr_verdict: Added single-paragraph reading guide between title block and thesis hero. Verification-class: no argument changes, no verdict changes — purely additive UX prose.
notes: ISS location description said sections.json:overview.html but there is no overview.html block in sections.json — the Overview tab is generated entirely in build-scripts/generate-html.js. Edit applied there instead.
